data.title: TECNO celebrated the 5th anniversary of Future Lens 2025 in Chongqing, highlighting dual telephoto breakthroughs in optical innovation. (Characters: 116)
data.description: A groundbreaking advancement in telephoto technology has been unveiled in CHONGQING, China, on Dec. 3, 2025. TECNO, a leading AI-driven technology brand, hosted Future Lens 2025 to commemorate the event's fifth anniversary. The event showcased two revolutionary telephoto innovations, signaling a new era of optical breakthroughs. The gathering attracted technology media representatives and highlighted the brand's commitment to innovation and progress in the industry.

data.title: SMJ International Holdings Inc. announces US$10 million IPO offering of 2,500,000 Class A ordinary shares at US$4.00 per share.
data.description: Singapore-based premium flooring specialist SMJ International Holdings Inc. disclosed the pricing of its firm commitment initial public offering, issuing an aggregate of 2,500,000 Class A ordinary shares valued at US$0.0002 per share. The shares were priced at US$4.00 each for the public Offering, bringing the total value of the Offering to USD 10,000,000. SMJ distributes a variety of high-end flooring products under its proprietary “SMJ” brand across Asian markets.

data.title: Linkage Global Inc closes $1 million private placement financing, issuing 689,655 Class A shares at $1.45 per share.
data.description: In Tokyo, Japan on December 3, 2025, Linkage Global Inc (NASDAQ: LGCB), a company based in Japan providing cross-border e-commerce integrated services, announced the completion of its private investment in public equity (PIPE) financing. As per the securities purchase agreement dated November 24, 2025, the company successfully issued and sold a total of 689,655 Class A Ordinary Shares at a rate of US$1.45 per share, generating roughly US$1,000,000 in gross proceeds. After deducting fees and offering expenses, the net proceeds will be utilized for general corporate purposes, predominantly to bolster working capital and enhance the Company’s cross-border sales operations.
